entities.name: PEARL MILLET
entities.description: An important rainfed crop cultivated for food and fodder in Western India

entities.name: GENETIC RESOURCES
entities.description: Biological materials of pearl millet used for identifying resistance

entities.name: RESISTANCE
entities.description: The ability of a plant to withstand diseases like leaf blast and down mildew

entities.name: LEAF BLAST
entities.description: A disease affecting pearl millet caused by Pyricularia pennisetigena

entities.name: PYRICULARIA PENNISETIGENA
entities.description: The fungal pathogen that causes leaf blast in pearl millet

entities.name: HOT AND ARID ENVIRONMENTS
entities.description: Environmental conditions found in Western India where pearl millet is grown

entities.name: WESTERN INDIA
entities.description: The geographical region where pearl millet is cultivated

entities.name: RAINFED CROP
entities.description: A crop that relies on rainfall for its water needs

entities.name: FOOD AND FODDER REQUIREMENTS
entities.description: The nutritional needs for humans and livestock met by pearl millet

entities.name: PRODUCTIVITY
entities.description: The measure of crop yield which has been enhanced in Western India

entities.name: EARLY HYBRIDS
entities.description: Hybrid pearl millet varieties that have enhanced productivity and disease resistance

entities.name: DOWN MILDEW DISEASE
entities.description: A disease affecting pearl millet that early hybrids are resistant to
